name: Brass Bathroom Hand Towel Stand Antique Finish - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add a touch of luxury to your bathroom space with this Bathroom Hand Towel Stand Antique Finish from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of metal, this hand towel stand features a sleek design in an antique finish for a vintage look. Featuring a rectangular base, this stand has a loop-like structure at the top to hold your towels. Add this practical and beautiful element to your bathroom for a luxe feel.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
